name: @buildtovalue/forms
description: Versioned form schema for the BuildToValue platform (D3): definitive format from day one — typed fields, mandatory dataClassification (LGPD), S-FEEL validation/visibleWhen expressions with `value` as a reserved word, submission validation usable on client AND server. Zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
